Important: Please Save Your Own Copy Before Editing :) 



SEVEN FIGURE EMAILS #4 

The “Non-Problem Problem”



Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers

2020



SEVEN FIGURE EMAILS #4

About The “Non-Problem Problem”

The Persuasion Deep Dive

Where to send it:

Message Mining Q’s:

Themeplate

See it in action:

10x Freelance Copywriter 2017



About The “Non-Problem Problem”  

Marketing (and life) truth bomb:



Every problem your product solves (or outcome it enables) in turn, creates a new set of problems. This themeplate is all about selling your prospect on the problems they WISH they had. 



Because If they can buy into a future with those new problems, they’re by default, investing in the decision to get there as well as overcoming their current problems along the way. 

In world where everyone is selling outcomes and benefits (which we still do), this template cuts through the noise by highlighting the new (upgraded) problems that arise as a result of solving the first set. 



The Persuasion Deep Dive



The “Non-Problem Problem” works on THREE levels: 



Point A (current problems) ---> Point B (Desired Outcomes) → Point C (New Problems)



Persuasion Principle #1: Presupposition



By getting your prospect to agree/buy-in to Point C (New Problems), there’s a presupposition that they’ve already made the trek from Point A to Point B (with your product). 



When it comes to copy, Point A is the EASIEST to get agreement on (it’s their current reality). But Point C is easier than Point B for the reason below: 



Persuasion Principle #2: Believability/Trust 



Consumers are skeptical by nature, and are therefore more likely to believe PROBLEMS than they are hypey claims or outcomes. By signaling the legit, hyper-specific problems that emerge as a result of those new outcomes, you increase believability and trust and bypass the need to oversell the positive outcomes that precede it. 



The positive outcomes/claims are essentially encased (or Trojan-Horse’d) inside the new problems that arise as a result. 



Persuasion Principle #3: Future Pacing



Future pacing is a powerful persuasion trigger that we’ve already covered in details across 10x Emails, 10x Launches, and Six Figure Emails (The Six Feet Under). This template provides a fresh iteration on the future pace. Instead of future-pacing ONLY the desirable outcomes (Point B), we future pace a better set of problems (Point C). 

Where to send it:

In the final 48 hours of a launch / evergreen funnel

As a standalone sales email

Message Mining Q’s:

For Upgraded Problems (be hyper-specific in describing them)



What are the *new* upgraded problems that will arise if my product/service delivers its core promise

During

Immediately after

3 months after

6 months+ after 



For Exclusive Empowerment: 



What has my ideal client already (and recently) achieved? (EE1 - Achievement)

What actions are my ideal client currently taking (or are willing to take) that should set them up for a better outcome (EE2 - Actions)

What higher aspirations/expectations does my ideal client have for themselves (EE3 - Aspiration) 



Themeplate

[Core Promise] 

[Moment of Highest Pleasure] - Point B

[Moment of Highest Tension] - Point A

[Your Product as the Difference Maker/Bridge]

[Exclusively Empowered Close] 

[Sell the next set of upgraded problems] -  Point C

[Final CTA]

See it in action: 

10x Freelance Copywriter 2017

Subject:

Last day to be a 10x Freelance Copywriter

Good news. Bad news.



Body:



<Timer>



Good news.



In about 4-6 months from now, growing your freelance copywriting biz and having your revenue levels match your skillset will no longer be a problem.



Either you’ll have “made it”



Y’know… 



… banking 5 figure months on the reg.



… having a long wait list of high-end clients clamoring for your keyboard.



… being at the helm of healthy email list, lining your pockets with leveraged revenue through product launches and affiliate campaigns.



… enjoying the support of automated systems, a talented VA, and a dialed in process that makes all of the above run smoother than a factory fresh Tesla. 



Or…



You’ll have given in to some sort of holding pattern.



Normalizing the subpar, inconsistent months.



Making your lifestyle goals fit into client budgets and timelines. 



Constantly living under the threat of having to go back to a day job, as you deal with scope creep, late payments, flaky prospects,  non-existent lead flow, nervous partners, and the severe lack of REM sleep that comes with all of the above,  



Cause here’s the deal… 



Big dreams need watering.



The 10x Freelance Copywriter is what takes your seed of ambition to become a well-paid freelancer, and lathers it with industrial grade miracle grow. 



Organic, of course. 



If you’re dead-set on staying middle of the pack (and can digest the reality above with a combo of “sleep-in Sundays” and working in a Snuggie, I’m not here to convince you otherwise. 



But if you’re committed to fast (and at times, scary) growth. 



If you’re totally cool with 30-40 hour workweeks, knowing that every one of those hours is fully optimized, focused, and engineered for traction and momentum. 



And are willing to let me coach you through the advanced business building mindsets, strategies, systems and processes that can make your ascent 10x faster and more profitable. 



Let’s just do this already.



-jo 



PS. While the “decision” to be a well-paid freelance copywriter will cease to be a problem in a few months from now….



There will be new problems.



Exciting problems.



Upgraded problems, whose solutions bring exponential growth in impact and income,



Problems like…



… how do I best use my VA to free up time and focus on my most highly leveraged tasks?



… how do I layer in new revenue streams? Do I create a course? Affiliate launches? All of the above? All at the same time?  



… how do I manage my day-to-day to deliver client work, develop new programs/trainings, build my authority, grow my email list, network with influencers, speak at conferences, and do all the other things associated with building a high-earning copywriting business?



All “problems” we’ll profitably solve in our next few months together



<TIMER>
